subcodes.first_line: Blessed are ye, O people of the letter Nún, inasmuch as ye have attained unto faith in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Drink ye, then, from the Kawthar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لکم یا اهل النون بما فزتم بالایمان بالله المهیمن القیوم ان اشربوا کوثر
subcodes.subjects: @law of obligatory prayer, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @living waters; water of life, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
